ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-19-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE SEP-04-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INDYMAC BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAMEA, MONTE $89,803.53 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $89,803.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-19-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
